# Samikaran NGO

Samikaran is a social initiative focused on building communication, confidence, and professional skills among students and youth, especially from underserved communities.

## Core Pages
- [About Us](/about)
- [Projects & Impact](/projects)
- [Media Presence](/media)
- [Donate & Support](/donate)
- [Contact Us](/contact)

## Mission
Providing communication and professional skills to build confidence in underserved communities.

## Vision
To build an able society where every individual leads a life of purpose.
